Title: Add a new vehicle manually
Preconditions: Application is running, no initial configuration has been performed.
Test Data: Vehicle details (make, model, year, license plate number).
Test Steps:
1. Start the application.
2. Follow the path: Avvio applicazione -> La configurazione iniziale è stata effettuata? -> No -> Aggiungi veicolo -> Inserisci il veicolo manualmente.
3. Enter the vehicle details.
4. Confirm the addition of the vehicle.
Expected Result: The vehicle is added to the list and the user is prompted to add another vehicle or return to the main menu.

Title: Add a new vehicle from dataset
Preconditions: Application is running, no initial configuration has been performed.
Test Data: Vehicle details (make, model, year, license plate number).
Test Steps:
1. Start the application.
2. Follow the path: Avvio applicazione -> La configurazione iniziale è stata effettuata? -> No -> Aggiungi veicolo -> Vuoi selezionare il tuo veicolo dal dataset? -> Si -> Cerca il veicolo nel dataset -> Seleziona e aggiungi il veicolo.
3. Search for the vehicle in the dataset.
4. Select and confirm the addition of the vehicle.
Expected Result: The vehicle is added to the list and the user is prompted to add another vehicle or return to the main menu.

Title: Add multiple vehicles
Preconditions: Application is running, no initial configuration has been performed.
Test Data: Multiple sets of vehicle details (make, model, year, license plate number).
Test Steps:
1. Start the application.
2. Follow the path: Avvio applicazione -> La configurazione iniziale è stata effettuata? -> No -> Aggiungi veicolo.
3. For each set of vehicle details, follow the path: Vuoi selezionare il tuo veicolo dal dataset? -> No -> Inserisci il veicolo manualmente -> Vuoi aggiungere un altro veicolo? -> Si.
4. Confirm the addition of each vehicle.
Expected Result: All vehicles are added to the list and the user is returned to the main menu.

Title: Add a vehicle but choose not to add another one
Preconditions: Application is running, no initial configuration has been performed.
Test Data: Vehicle details (make, model, year, license plate number).
Test Steps:
1. Start the application.
2. Follow the path: Avvio applicazione -> La configurazione iniziale è stata effettuata? -> No -> Aggiungi veicolo.
3. For the first vehicle, follow the path: Vuoi selezionare il tuo veicolo dal dataset? -> No -> Inserisci il veicolo manualmente -> Vuoi aggiungere un altro veicolo? -> No.
4. Confirm the addition of the vehicle.
Expected Result: The vehicle is added to the list and the user is returned to the main menu.

Title: Add a vehicle but choose to add another one
Preconditions: Application is running, no initial configuration has been performed.
Test Data: Vehicle details (make, model, year, license plate number).
Test Steps:
1. Start the application.
2. Follow the path: Avvio applicazione -> La configurazione iniziale è stata effettuata? -> No -> Aggiungi veicolo.
3. For the first vehicle, follow the path: Vuoi selezionare il tuo veicolo dal dataset? -> No -> Inserisci il veicolo manualmente -> Vuoi aggiungere un altro veicolo? -> Si.
4. For the second vehicle, follow the path: Vuoi selezionare il tuo veicolo dal dataset? -> No -> Inserisci il veicolo manualmente -> Vuoi aggiungere un altro veicolo? -> No.
5. Confirm the addition of both vehicles.
Expected Result: Both vehicles are added to the list and the user is returned to the main menu.

Title: Access distributor list without modifying sorting parameters
Preconditions: Application is running, distributor list is available.
Test Steps:
1. Start the application.
2. Follow the path: Accesso lista distributori -> Visualizza lista dei distributori.
Expected Result: The distributor list is displayed and the user can select a distributor.

Title: Access distributor list after modifying sorting parameters
Preconditions: Application is running, distributor list is available.
Test Steps:
1. Start the application.
2. Follow the path: Accesso lista distributori -> Vuoi modificare i parametri di ordinamento della lista di distributori? -> Si -> Personalizza i parametri di ordinamento -> Visualizza lista dei distributori aggiornata secondo i parametri aggiornati.
3. Modify the sorting parameters.
4. Follow the path: Seleziona il distributore -> Apertura automatica dell'app di navigazione -> Navigazione terminata, raggiunto distributore.
Expected Result: The distributor list is displayed with the modified sorting parameters and the user can select a distributor.

Title: Access distributor list and select a distributor
Preconditions: Application is running, distributor list is available.
Test Steps:
1. Start the application.
2. Follow the path: Accesso lista distributori -> Seleziona il distributore.
Expected Result: The selected distributor is highlighted and the user can navigate to it using the navigation app.

Title: Access settings page and view settings
Test Steps:
1. Start the application.
2. Follow the path: Accesso pagina impostazioni -> Visualizza le impostazioni.
Expected Result: The settings page is displayed and the user can view the current settings.

Title: Access settings page and change screen to distributor list
Test Steps:
1. Start the application.
2. Follow the path: Accesso pagina impostazioni -> Vuoi cambiare schermata? -> Si -> Click sull'accesso pagina lista distributori, tramite la barra di navigazione? -> Si -> Accesso lista distributori -> Vedi altri diagrammi.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the distributor list page and can view other diagrams.

Title: Access settings page and modify vehicle list
Preconditions: Application is running, at least one vehicle is in the list.
Test Data: Vehicle details (make, model, year, license plate number).
Test Steps:
1. Start the application.
2. Follow the path: Accesso pagina impostazioni -> Vuoi modificare i tuoi veicoli? -> Si -> Modifica lista dei veicoli -> Visualizza pop-up "modifica effettuata".
Expected Result: The vehicle list is modified and a confirmation pop-up is displayed.

Title: Access settings page and not modify vehicle list
Preconditions: Application is running, at least one vehicle is in the list.
Test Steps:
1. Start the application.
2. Follow the path: Accesso pagina impostazioni -> Vuoi modificare i tuoi veicoli? -> No.
Expected Result: The user remains on the settings page without any modifications to the vehicle list. <|end|>
